parameters.name: On
parameters.description: Turns the device off. Also toggles the switch accordingly.

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Stops purging of stored materials in the structure. Also resets the lever accordingly.

parameters.name: Activate
parameters.description: Writing a 0 to the device stops the construction of the chosen item.

parameters.name: Lock
parameters.description: Allows manual interaction with the structure.

parameters.name: ClearMemory
parameters.description: Writing a 0 to a structure doesn't have any impact.

parameters.name: RecipeHash
parameters.description: Sets the machine to the recipe corresponding to the written hash number.

outputs.name: On
outputs.description: The Autolathe is not powered. This is the same as the physical red powerswitch located on the structure.

outputs.name: Open
outputs.description: Output of the Autolathe is closed. This is the same as the physical lever located on the structure.

outputs.name: Activate
outputs.description: The structure is currently producing nothing.

outputs.name: Lock
outputs.description: 1 if device is locked, otherwise 0, can be set in most devices and prevents the user from access the values.

outputs.name: Power
outputs.description: Can be read to return if the device is correctly powered or not, set via the power system, return 1 if powered and O if not.

outputs.name: Error
outputs.description: 1 if device is in error state, otherwise 0.

outputs.name: RecipeHash
outputs.description: Current hash of the recipe the device is set to produce.

outputs.name: Reagents
outputs.description: Total number of reagents inside the device (e.g. 92g of iron = 92).

outputs.name: RequiredPower
outputs.description: Idle operating power quantity. Does not include extra power demanded during recipe fabrication.

outputs.name: CompletionRatio
outputs.description: How complete the current production is for this device, between 0 and 1.

outputs.name: ExportCount
outputs.description: How many items exported since last ClearMemory. This count is based on every ouput stack of items (e.g. 1 item and 12g of iron = 2).

outputs.name: ImportCount
outputs.description: How many items imported since last ClearMemory. The count is based on stacks (e.g. 92g of iron in on stack = 1).

outputs.name: ReferenceId
outputs.description: Unique Reference Identifier for this object.
